## PR title format

<!-- This repo uses Conventional Commits for automated releases.
     Your PR title MUST follow this format (used as the squash-merge commit message):

     fix: resolve spectral path on Windows
     feat: add tool to list templates
     feat!: drop Node 18 support
     docs: update DEVELOPMENT.md
     chore: upgrade vitest
     test: add coverage for converter tool

     See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full prefix cheat sheet.
     Only fix: and feat: (including breaking !) trigger npm releases. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new or changed behavior
